since_last: 92% of 89 AI names green; Applied AI: Industrial, Defense & Vertical leads +1.97%; AI bubble risk 57 Heating Up.

cards.headline: The tape: a broad bid, 92% of AI names green
cards.body: SPX -0.05% · BTC +1.88% · Gold -0.37% · Nasdaq100 -1.09%. 92% of 89 AI names are green — a broad bid. Applied AI: Industrial, Defense & Vertical is doing the heavy lifting at +1.97%.

cards.headline: Applied AI: Industrial, Defense & Vertical leads, Data Center, Power & Energy lags
cards.body: Strongest AI sector is Applied AI: Industrial, Defense & Vertical at +1.97%; weakest is Data Center, Power & Energy at +1.03%. Rotation within the AI trade, not a one-way move.

cards.headline: AVAV is the standout at +5.48%
cards.body: Leaders: AVAV +5.48%, AMAT +4.17%, PLTR +4.05%, CEVA +3.97%, ORCL +3.75%. Laggards: DLR -1.23%, AES -0.25%, DELL -0.21%, CRNC -0.09%.
cards.watch: Hot means attention, not direction — watch whether the leaders hold the bid or fade into the next session.

cards.headline: SpaceX (SPCX) +2.11% at $156.46
cards.body: The SpaceX debut keeps pulling attention — SPCX is +2.11% this session. The biggest IPO in history remains the tape's attention magnet.

cards.headline: AVAV moving on no clear catalyst
cards.body: AVAV is +5.02% with no fresh headline this cycle — attention without a story. Volume, not news, is doing the work.

cards.headline: Risk: AI bubble index 57 — Heating Up
cards.body: The composite AI Bubble Index sits at 57/100, led by Valuation at 85. Higher = frothier; the risk is everyone caring at once while valuations are already stretched.
